title: Define Three Layers
description: Create three layers: reset, base, theme. Add a body style to base and a link color to theme.
solution: @layer reset, base, theme; @layer reset { * { margin: 0; padding: 0; } } @layer base { body { font-family: system-ui; line-height: 1.5; } } @layer theme { a { color: #3b82f6; } }

title: Layer a Framework
description: Simulate layering a third-party framework by importing into a 'framework' layer.
solution: @import url('framework.css') layer(framework); /* All framework styles are now contained in the framework layer */

title: Override Framework Styles
description: Create a 'framework' layer and an 'overrides' layer where your styles always win.
hint: Put overrides after framework in the layer order.
solution: @layer framework, overrides; @layer framework { .btn { background: gray; border-radius: 4px; } } @layer overrides { .btn { background: #3b82f6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; } }

title: Nested Layer Architecture
description: Create a component library with nested layers: components.buttons, components.cards, etc.
solution: @layer reset, base, components, utilities; @layer components { @layer buttons { .btn { padding: 12px 24px; background: #3b82f6; border: none; border-radius: 8px; color: white; } } @layer cards { .card { background: #1a1a2e; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; } } }
